props.ChoiceText: In a season of cramping guts, weakness, and foul water, you learned which herbs soothed and which merely gave hope.
props.ChoiceBio: Treating the bloody flux taught you how medicine often works at the edge of despair and guesswork.

0.TransitionText: Because treating the bloody flux taught you how medicine often works at the edge of despair and guesswork, you stayed with bodies, remedies, and the uneasy authority of healing.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Physician, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because treating the bloody flux taught you how medicine often works at the edge of despair and guesswork, you were drawn into half-hidden remedies and village mysteries.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cunning Folk, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because treating the bloody flux taught you how medicine often works at the edge of despair and guesswork, suffering pushed you toward faith and consolation.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Religious, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: Someone remembers you from the fever season when clean water and herbs were worth more than promises.
